productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Light Blue Canvas Cap
description: CompositionLight blue box cap made of 100% cotton, with a concealed elastic band at the back and appliquéd patch on the leftWash careDry wash onlyYou don't have to be in the military to wear a box cap. Impress family, friends, and co-workers with this simple yet elegant cap from wrangler. The cap features a wrangler logo appliquéd on the left for maximum style effect, while you can customise the Fit with the elastic band.
